summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: parametric Gaussian p_β(x)=e^(-βx²)/Z with ValueTracker beta_tr touring 0.15, 2.0, 0.8, 0.5. always_redraw YELLOW density curve + BLUE β=0.5 reference. Live numeric H=-∫p log p via np.trapezoid matches analytic ½ log(2πeσ²) with σ²=1/(2β); proves Gaussian maximizes entropy at fixed variance.
